settings.heading: Use filters and product pages to choose the right fit
settings.text: Collections may include templates, toolkits, documentation suites, on-demand services, managed services and support options. Compare the type, delivery model and support level before checkout or enquiry.
settings.type_text: Check whether the product is a template, toolkit, documentation suite, on-demand service, managed service or support option.
settings.delivery_text: Digital resources may be self-serve. Service, deployed or supported options may require intake, review, booking or manual fulfilment.
settings.support_text: Use Support or Advisory before purchase if the right product, package, variant or delivery pathway is unclear.
